zh.Sizergh Castle, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Strickland於大約1380年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Walter Strickland59歲，母親Margaret Lathom39歲。他於1405年2月與Mabel Beetham在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1403年登記服兵役。他於1415年在英國被列為knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt。他去世於1455年7月30日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Sizergh Castle, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh-hans.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Strickland于大约1380年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir Walter Strickland59岁，母亲Margaret Lathom39岁。他于1405年2月与Mabel Beetham在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1403年登记服兵役。他于1415年在英国被列为knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt。他去世于1455年7月30日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stīrc ‘stirk, young bullock or heifer’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Strickland was born about 1380, in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Walter Strickland, was 59 and his mother, Margaret Lathom, was 39. He married Mabel Beetham in February 1405, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1403. In 1415, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt in England. He died before 30 July 1455, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Strickland est né environ 1380, à Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Strickland, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lathom, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Beetham en février 1405, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1403. En 1415, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt à Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 30 juillet 1455, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Strickland um 1380 in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Strickland 59 und seine Mutter Margaret Lathom 39. Er hat im Februar 1405 in Westmorland, England Mabel Beetham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1403 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1415, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt in England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 30. Juli 1455 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Strickland è nato il circa 1380 nel Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Strickland, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lathom, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Mabel Beetham nel febbraio 1405, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1403. Nel 1415, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt nel England. Morì prima del 30 luglio 1455, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Sizergh Castle, Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハル
ja.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハル
ja.Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランド
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stricklandが約1380年にイギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Stricklandは59歳，母Margaret Lathomは39歳であった。1405年2月にイギリスウエストモーランドでMabel Beethamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年に兵役登録をした。1415年，36歳の時，イギリスでの職業はknighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourtと記録されている。彼は1455年7月30日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Strickland(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 시즈르그h 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Strickland(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lathom(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1405년 2월 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Mabel Beetham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1415년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt이었다. 그는 1455년 7월 30일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1380–before 30 July 1455: ойролцоогоор 1380 он–1455 оны Долоодугаар сарын 30–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Strickland nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Strickland, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lathom, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel Beetham em fevereiro de 1405, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1403. Em 1415, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 30 de julho de 1455, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Strickland родился около 1380 г. в местности сизирг холл, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Strickland было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lathom, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Beetham февраль 1405 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1403 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1415 году, в возрасте 36 лет, работал по профессии knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt в местности Англия. Он умер перед 30 июля 1455 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1380–before 30 July 1455: e tusa o le 1380–a'e le'I oo le 30 Iulai 1455

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Strickland nació aproximadamente 1380, en Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Strickland, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Margaret Lathom, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Mabel Beetham en febrero de 1405, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1403. En 1415, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era knighted in 1415 at the battle of agincourt en Inglaterra. Murió antes de 30 de julio de 1455, en su pueblo.
